title: BAN long 75x +79.33% (EN)
body:
📊 Verified P&L — BAN/USDT Long · 75x · +79.33% (42m)

The idea: after the flush, BAN reclaimed support and printed a higher low — longed the reclaim.

The risk: the invalidation just below the reclaimed level was placed before entry — that line decides when we're wrong, the market doesn't get to decide it for us.

Same pair, opposite side, still 75x. The constant across our trades isn't direction or multiplier — it's that the loss is fixed up front. High leverage punishes guessing; it tolerates a planned, sized risk.

⚠️ Past result, not a prediction. High leverage = high risk of total loss. Educational only, not financial advice.

#RealResults
